commands.command: node --test action-runtime/guardrails.test.mjs providers/network.test.mjs agents/setup-agent.test.mjs credentials.test.mjs providers/youtube/actions/reads.test.mjs

surfaceEvidence.invocation: esbuild actual mcp/src/server.mjs, spawn bundled server with StdioClientTransport, list tools, cloak_launch, cloak_status, cloak_teardown
cloak_provider_capabilities direct handler and stdio tools/list
generateServerRegistration for eight clients plus adversarial POSIX shell quoting

adversarialCases: returned provider catalog mutation does not persist
Reddit URL falls back to generic and provider action is refused
write defaults to dry-run and performs no navigation
shell expansion characters and apostrophes remain literal
bundled server performs a real credential-free browser lifecycle
limitations: Credentialed real-site provider reads and writes require user authorization and credentials and are deliberately not represented as passing CI evidence.
